command: fastp --in1 test_data/EPSC2_L1_1.fq.gz --in2 test_data/EPSC2_L1_2.fq.gz --stdout --merge --merged_out results/intermediate/EPSC2_merged.fastq.gz --overlap_len_require 10 --overlap_diff_limit 2 --correction --thread 10 --json results/intermediate/EPSC2_fastp.json --html results/intermediate/EPSC2_fastp.html --report_title EPSC2 - fastp merge report --qualified_quality_phred 20
